report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Solana Developer Platform (SDP) Guide covering the enterprise API toolkit launched today (March 24, 2026) with Mastercard, Worldpay, and Western Union as early adopters; and Agentic Payments Protocols Compared 2026 covering the 5 competing/complementary standards (x402, ACP, AP2, ERC-8183, Open Wallet Standard) for AI agent-to-agent and agent-to-service payments.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Solana Developer Platform (SDP) launched March 24, 2026 by the Solana Foundation — bundles 20+ tech partners into a single enterprise API with 3 modules: Issuance (tokenized deposits, stablecoins, RWAs), Payments (fiat-to-stablecoin flows), and Trading (atomic swaps, coming later 2026)
Early SDP adopters: Mastercard (stablecoin settlement), Worldpay (merchant payments), Western Union (cross-border payments) — signaling serious institutional adoption of Solana
SDP is AI-native: compatible with Claude Code by Anthropic and Codex by OpenAI for natural language blockchain development

Agentic payments landscape has 5+ competing/complementary protocols as of March 2026: x402 (Coinbase, 115M+ txns), ACP (OpenAI/Stripe, launched Feb 2026), AP2 (Google), ERC-8183 (Virtuals Protocol, Draft stage), and Open Wallet Standard (MoonPay, launched March 23, 2026)

These protocols are not competitors but complementary layers: x402 for M2M micropayments, ACP for e-commerce checkout, AP2 for authorization, ERC-8183 for on-chain settlement, Open Wallet Standard for secure agent key management
MoonPay's Open Wallet Standard (March 23, 2026) ensures private keys never touch the AI agent or LLM — addresses the critical security gap in autonomous agent payments

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solana Developer Platform (SDP) Guide 2026 — 720-line learn guide covering the 3 core API modules, enterprise use cases, early adopter analysis (Mastercard, Worldpay, Western Union), 20+ technology partners, AI-native development compatibility, connection to broader stablecoin narrative (GENIUS Act, PayFi, $307B stablecoin market cap), risks and limitations, and 6 FAQs. Includes 5+ internal links to related guides.

Agentic Payments Protocols Compared 2026 — 877-line learn guide covering why agents need payment rails, the layered protocol stack concept, deep dives on all 5 protocols (x402, ACP, AP2, ERC-8183, Open Wallet Standard) with architecture details, side-by-side comparison table, production readiness assessment, risks and open questions, and 6 FAQs. Includes 5+ internal links to related AI/agent guides.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: SDP guide: title 'Solana Developer Platform (SDP) Guide 2026 — Enterprise APIs for Stablecoins & RWAs | degen0x', target keywords: solana developer platform, SDP solana, solana enterprise API, mastercard solana, worldpay solana, western union solana

Agentic Payments guide: title 'Agentic Payments Protocols Compared 2026: x402 vs ACP vs AP2 vs ERC-8183 | degen0x', target keywords: agentic payments protocols, x402 vs ACP, AP2 Google agent payments, ERC-8183, AI agent payments comparison, Open Wallet Standard
Both pages include Article + FAQ structured data schemas (JSON-LD) for rich snippet eligibility, OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, Twitter card metadata

Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts, internal links to /learn/solana-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026, /learn/payfi-guide, /learn/ai-agent-payments-x402-guide, /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide, /learn/defai-guide-2026, and related guides
Fixed 'use client' directive conflict with metadata export on SDP page, corrected articleSchema function signatures to match structured-data.ts interface (title/url/author as string)
